housekeeping.reason: ORCHESTRATE CYCLE 33 (2026-03-19 11:30 UTC): ESCALATION + CONTINUATION + FRESH PICK. KEY CHANGE: #334 (billwatch provider DB) ESCALATED after failing its 4th consecutive cycle ('final cycle'). It joins #241, #332, #254 as issues that cannot be completed by autonomous workers. Replaced with #266 (afterloss county SEO), a fresh unblocked issue with high completion probability. #333 and #292 retained for 3rd cycle — both have solid WIP foundations and are the top SEO plays for their respective products. Revenue thesis: #333 drives organic traffic to BillWatch → future conversion via provider switching. #292 and #266 expand AfterLoss SEO surface area → affiliate link opportunities in content.
